Items.Title: 编码：将您的想法变为现实的艺术 | Coding: The Art of Bringing Your Ideas to Life
Items.Description:
您有没有想过网站、移动应用程序和软件是如何创建的？ 答案是编码。 编码是为计算机编写指令以理解和执行特定任务的过程。

随着技术的不断进步，对熟练编码人员的需求正在上升。 编码不再只是计算机科学家和工程师的工具，而是各行各业的人的宝贵技能。 从金融到医疗保健，编码正在改变我们的生活和工作方式。

那么，是什么让编码成为一项如此宝贵的技能呢？ 对于初学者，它教授解决问题的技巧。 在编码时，您必须逻辑和系统地思考，以找到解决复杂问题的方法。 这种技能不仅在技术环境中很有价值，在日常生活中也很有价值。

编码的另一个好处是能够将您的想法变为现实。 无论您是想为自己的企业创建网站、构建移动应用程序还是设计软件，编码都是实现这一目标的关键。 通过编码，天空是极限。

如果您有兴趣学习编码，可以使用大量资源。 在线课程、教程和论坛是一个很好的起点。 实践是成为一名成功编码员的关键，所以不要害怕投入并开始培养你的技能。

编码可能具有挑战性，但它也非常有益。 随着您的进步，您会发现自己对自己的能力更有信心，并为自己构建的项目感到自豪。

那么为什么不尝试编码呢？ 无论您是在寻找一份新的职业、一种爱好，还是只是一种将您的想法变为现实的方式，编码都是一个完美的起点。 准备好开始一段充满创造力、解决问题和无限可能的旅程。



原文:

Have you ever wondered how websites, mobile apps, and software are created? The answer is coding. Coding is the process of writing instructions for computers to understand and carry out specific tasks.

As technology continues to advance, the demand for skilled coders is on the rise. Coding is no longer just a tool for computer scientists and engineers, but a valuable skill for people in a variety of industries. From finance to healthcare, coding is changing the way we live and work.

So what is it that makes coding such a valuable skill? For starters, it teaches problem-solving skills. When coding, you must think logically and systematically to find solutions to complex problems. This skill is not only valuable in a technical setting, but in everyday life as well.

Another benefit of coding is the ability to bring your ideas to life. Whether you want to create a website for your business, build a mobile app, or design software, coding is the key to making it happen. With coding, the sky's the limit.

If you're interested in learning to code, there are plenty of resources available. Online courses, tutorials, and forums are a great place to start. Practice is key to becoming a successful coder, so don't be afraid to dive in and start building your skills.

Coding can be challenging, but it's also incredibly rewarding. As you progress, you'll find yourself feeling more confident in your abilities and proud of the projects you've built.

So why not give coding a try? Whether you're looking for a new career, a hobby, or just a way to bring your ideas to life, coding is the perfect place to start. Get ready to embark on a journey of creativity, problem-solving, and endless possibilities.
Items.Author: mirazdev

Items.Title: 网站第一天 | Website Day 1
Items.Description:
阿贝尔饶

发表于 2 月 4 日

所以昨天我接受了挑战，开始在我自己的个人投资组合网站上真正开始。 我开始设计并决定在所有繁重的工作完成后添加内容。 所以我去 Dribble 寻找一些设计主题。 我最终确定的是新野蛮主义。 我在设计方面非常无用，并且知道的足以让它通过。 但是这次我想让网站看起来实际上还不错。 新野蛮主义遵循棱角分明、色彩鲜艳、笔触大胆的设计，这与我们今天在现代网站上看到的截然不同。 然后我发现了一个名为 dodonut.com 的网站，我非常喜欢它的调色板，所以我拿出了最常用的颜色并开始工作。 我添加了一个标题、一个基本介绍、我的社交和一个关于部分，所有这些都遵循相同的模式。 然后我意识到在标题上有一个滚动进度会很好所以我查找了一些代码来做到这一点并将其放入。

 const [completion, setCompletion] = useState(0) useEffect(() => { const updateScroll = () => { const progress = window.scrollY const scrollHeight = document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight if (scrollHeight){ setCompletion( Number((progress / scrollHeight).toFixed(2)) * 100 ) } } window.addEventListener('scroll', updateScroll) return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', updateScroll) }, []) return completion

这个完成变量是一个介于 0 和 100 之间的值，具体取决于您在页面上的位置，现在将一个转换属性放在一个空的 div 上可以增加一个很好的效果来显示滚动进度。

 <div style={{ transform: `scaleX(${completion / 100})` }} className={styles.progress} />

然后我将这些更改推送到 GitHub 存储库，尽管您看不到多少，但这花费了大量时间。

人们编码的原因仍然是个谜。 让自己经历如此多的痛苦，却只取得这么少的成就，这违背了人类的直觉。 然而，我们中的许多人每天都这样做，并从中收获快乐。 人类真是一个奇怪的种族——阿贝尔·拉奥2023

原文:

Abeer Rao

Posted on Feb 4

So yesterday I took on the challenge to actually get started on my own personal portfolio website. I got started with the design and decided that I will add the content later on when all the heavy lifting has been done. So I went to Dribble to look for some design themes. And the one I finalised is Neobrutalism. I am very trashy at design and know just about enough for it to pass. But this time I wanted to make the website look actually half decent. Neobrutalism follows the design of having sharp edges, bright colours, and bold strokes, which is quite different from what we see on modern websites today. I then came across a website called dodonut.com whose colour palette I really liked, so I took out the most used colours and got to work. I added a header, a basic introduction, my socials, and an about section all following the same pattern. I then realised that having a scroll progress on the header would be good so I looked up some code to do it and put it in.

const [completion, setCompletion] = useState(0)

    useEffect(() => {
        const updateScroll = () => {
            const progress = window.scrollY
            const scrollHeight = document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight
            if (scrollHeight){
                setCompletion(
                    Number((progress / scrollHeight).toFixed(2)) * 100
                )
            }
        }
        window.addEventListener('scroll', updateScroll)
        return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', updateScroll)
    }, [])

    return completion

This completion variable is a value between 0 and 100 depending on where you are on the page, now putting a transform property on an empty div adds a nice effect to show scroll progress.

<div
    style={{ transform: `scaleX(${completion / 100})` }}
    className={styles.progress} />

I then pushed these changes to the GitHub repo and despite how little you can see, this took a substantial amount of time.

The reason people code is still a mystery. To put oneself through so much pain to achieve so little goes against human intuitiveness. Yet so many of us do it on a daily basis and reap happiness out of it. Humans are truly a weird race - Abeer Rao 2023
